search.query: `cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | eval hostAndHostname = hostname."(".device.")" | stats values(device) as Device by hostAndHostname | fields hostAndHostname Device | sort 0 hostAndHostname

| search Device=$multiTokenQuery$ | rename sensor as Sensor tempmod as Module | stats latest(Model) as Model latest(ModuleType) as ModuleType latest("Current Temperature(Celsius)") as "Current Temperature(Celsius)", , values(Sensor) as SensorS, latest("Major Threshold(Celsius)") as "Major Threshold(Celsius)", latest("Minor Threshold(Celsius)") as "Minor Threshold(Celsius)", latest(Status) as Status, sparkline(avg(Current Temperature(Celsius))) as "Current Temperature History" by Hostname,Device,Module,Sensor | sort 0 Module | sort 0 Device | fields Hostname Device Module Model ModuleType Sensor "Current Temperature(Celsius)" "Current Temperature History" "Major Threshold(Celsius)" "Minor Threshold(Celsius)" Status
